title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent that runs on desktop (Mac and Windows) and automates daily tasks by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and apps. The tutorial demonstrates organizing files, connecting Gmail and Google Calendar through connectors, and scheduling recurring tasks. It is available exclusively in Claude Pro and Max plans.
